channel.title: Posts on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My New Hugo Site

item.title: 如何用hugo框架在github上建立靜態網站
item.description: https://winget.run/ 搜尋hugo. 點擊hugo（不是extend的那一個），複製指令 winget install -e --id Hugo.Hugo， 貼到終端機 在終端機中輸入hugo驗證安裝，如果成功會出現 PS C:\Users\seans> hugo Total in 2 ms Error: Unable to locate config file or config directory. Perhaps you need to create a new site. Run `hugo help new` for details. PS C:\Users\seans> 4.建立一個 工作用 資料夾，並在裏面打開終端機 可以用以下方式，在檔案總管上面輸入cmd按enter。 找個喜歡的主題吧 https://themes.gohugo.io/ https://gohugo.io/getting-started/quick-start/ 推薦這個 https://github.com/nanxiaobei/hugo-paper 6.輸入 hugo new site [YOUR-BLOG-NAME] 在終端機中 result would be PS C:\Users\seans\codewhitelist\newnew> hugo new site myblog Congratulations! Your new Hugo site was created in C:\Users\seans\codewhitelist\newnew\myblog.

item.title: My First Post
item.description: Introduction to Markdown (MD) Format What is Markdown? Markdown is a lightweight markup language with plain-text formatting syntax. It is designed to be easy to read and write, while also converting to HTML for presentation on the web. Markdown is widely used for formatting text on platforms such as GitHub, Reddit, Stack Overflow, and many more. Why Markdown? Markdown offers several advantages: Simplicity: Markdown syntax is straightforward and easy to learn.
